keys.description: Running balance per (tenant, account) in the tenant's base currency. Read by AccountBalanceCalculator on every read + by the SDUI ledger-account list. Hot path — every ledger entry write invalidates the affected account's key.
invalidatedBy: LedgerReconciliationCompleted (invalidates all keys after reconciler run to force fresh reads)
TransactionReversed (invalidates every account touched by both the source + reversal transactions)

keys.description: Running balance per (tenant, account, currency) — for multi-currency tenants where an account (e.g. cash) may hold balances in multiple currencies simultaneously. Same TTL + invalidation as the base-currency key.

Running-balance history for the account over a date range. Feeds the SDUI account-history view. Longer TTL because history is stable (transactions are IMMUTABLE — only new writes at now() append to the series).
invalidatedBy: TransactionLedgerEntryObserver.created (invalidates every history key whose (from, to) window covers created_at)

keys.description: Tracks whether the threshold-crossing detector has already fired an alert for the current threshold state — prevents alert-storming when the balance oscillates around the threshold. TTL 1h (aligns with the 30-min detector cadence + slop).
Parsed data/kind-catalog.json. Read by TransactionObserver.creating for kind validation + by SDUI kind-picker widget. Loaded once at boot + rarely invalidated.
Parsed data/chart-of-accounts-catalog.json. Read by TransactionLedgerEntryObserver.creating for account validation + by SDUI account-picker widget. Loaded once at boot + rarely invalidated.

Per-tenant enabled account list. A tenant may disable specific accounts via settings (e.g. skip chargebacks_expense if they never take chargebacks). Read by TransactionLedgerEntryObserver + by SDUI account-picker.

Cached exchange rate for a currency pair. TTL 1h (aligns with the transaction.exchange_rate.cache_ttl_seconds config). Fresh fetches update the key + notify TransactionCurrencyConverted downstream listeners.

The tenant's transaction_halt_new flag. Read by TransactionObserver.creating on every write. Very short TTL (10s) because clearing the flag needs to propagate quickly across all workers when ops resolves an imbalance.
Latest reconciler-run stats per tenant. Fed by the SDUI reconciliation-report screen. TTL 25h (aligns with nightly cadence + 1h slop).
Unresolved imbalance count per tenant. Feeds the SDUI imbalance-count badge.

Cached General Ledger report for the (tenant, year, month) tuple. Fed by GenerateGeneralLedgerReportJob output. Long TTL (30d) because the report is stable — the underlying transactions are immutable + closed months don't change.
invalidatedBy: manual: transaction:invalidate-report (used after a legitimate month-end adjustment)

keys.description: Current sequence value for the transaction_number generator per (tenant, year). Used only inside the Postgres advisory lock to avoid a DB round-trip on every increment. Sync-back to DB on every 100 sequence increments.
